title: Midrian WIMP - Where is my portal?
description: Have a Minecraft experience without your precious portals
body:
Midrian - Where is My Portal

Where did my portals go? It doesn't matter! With this mod you can traverse dimensions in a non-traditional way! Drill through bedrock to reach the nether, and reach for the sky to find the end!

This mod aims to allow the player to traverse dimensions without the need for a portal, while maintaining the timeline of the original game.

Craft a blacksmithing mold using obsidian, and create a pickaxe capable of piercing bedrock with a new metal, bedsteel. Reach the depths of the Nether to create the End Star, and reach the heavens to face the Enderdragon!
